api/CXEX.Lang.Abi.AbiPrelude.html.summary: Class AbiPrelude Namespace CXEX.Lang.Abi Assembly CXEX.Lang.dll Generates the X prelude (abi.x) from the frozen CXK ABI (abi/cxk_abi.h): the SYS_* numbers, E_* error codes, the shared arg structs, and typed __syscall wrappers. Compiling against this keeps X programs in lockstep with the kernel - one source of truth across kernel, C, .NET, and X. v0.1 emits the frozen v1 values directly; a later version can parse cxk_abi.h to stay automatic. public static class AbiPrelude Inheritance object AbiPrelude Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Fields FileName public const string FileName = "abi.x" Field Value string Methods Generate() public static string Generate() Returns string

api/CXEX.Lang.Sema.html.title: Namespace CXEX.Lang.Sema | CX DevKit API
api/CXEX.Lang.Sema.html.summary: Namespace CXEX.Lang.Sema Classes ConstFold Compile-time constant evaluation for X core v0.1: integer/bool literals, the arithmetic/comparison/logical operators, unary neg/not, casts (value-preserving), and references to other consts. Used for const initializers, global initializers, and array lengths. Returns false (with a diagnostic) for anything not constant. Resolver Pass 1: collect top-level declarations, then resolve every name to a symbol, tracking lexical scopes for params/locals. Reports duplicates + undefined names. Scope Lexical scope chain. Globals live at the root; functions push a child. SemaContext Shared semantic state produced by the Resolver and consumed by the TypeChecker: top-level symbols, struct decls by name, and per-NameExpr resolution. Symbol TypeChecker Pass 2: assign a type to every expression and check statements. v0.1 is deliberately lenient on integer width (any int coerces to any int) so the language is usable before a full numeric-conversion policy exists; pointers, bools, structs, and arrays are checked strictly. Records each expr's type in ctx.Types for CodeGen. The __syscall intrinsic is the one effect primitive. Enums SymKind
